Making chocolate for idols!

꒷꒦)꒷꒦) ๋ ࣭ ⭑꒷꒦)꒷꒦) ๋ ࣭ ⭑꒷꒦)꒷꒦

VEVEVEVEVVEBEVEVEVEVWVE (Very loud squeals of happiness)

GUYS, I FEEL SO GOOD, I FEEL JUST GREAT, THIS IS THE FIRST VALENTINE'S DAY, WHICH I CELEBRATE NOT ALONE, BUT WITH THE PERSON I LOVE!! I LOVE, DO NOT DEPEND AND DO NOT USE IN ORDER TO FILL THE LONELINESS!! I AM SO HAPPY!!!! (I hope you don't mind that I share this with you)

Well, since I'm here, you don't mind if I tell you a little bit about what the teachers told me in the Japanese course, Hmm?

Probably, it is no secret for many that the Japanese are quite closed people, and in their culture they often express words of love not in words, but in hints.

February 14, Valentine's Day. In Japan, it is celebrated like this: girls give gifts to their acquaintances and friends, however, if they want to confess their love, they give the object of love expensive chocolate.

March 14, White Day, on this day, men give gifts to those who gave them gifts on February 14. They try not to forget anyone, because their authority will fall in the eyes of others... However, if the girl gave them expensive chocolate, and their feelings are mutual, then the man gives expensive underwear to girl.

April 14. Orange day. On this day, if a couple understands that they will not have a good relationship, then they give each other an orange.

I may be wrong or forget something, but I really wanted to share this fact about the celebration of February 14 in Japan, which I was told about by teachers, hehe!!

Oh, and yes, I've tried to roughly describe Anzu's clothes, so mistakes are possible.
creator: Ivu_chan
